2605.15081.title: ML-Embed: Inclusive and Efficient Embeddings for a Multilingual World
2605.15081.paper_summary: The development of high-quality text embeddings is increasingly drifting toward an exclusionary future, defined by three critical barriers: prohibitive computational costs, a narrow linguistic focus that neglects most of the world's languages, and a lack of transparency from closed-source or open-weight models that stifles research. To dismantle these barriers, we introduce ML-Embed, a suite of inclusive and efficient models built upon a new framework: 3-Dimensional Matryoshka Learning (3D-ML). Our framework addresses the computational challenge with comprehensive efficiency across the entire model lifecycle. Beyond the storage benefits of Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) and flexible inference-time depth provided by Matryoshka Layer Learning (MLL), we introduce Matryoshka Embedding Learning (MEL) for enhanced parameter efficiency. To address the linguistic challenge, we curate a massively multilingual dataset and train a suite of models ranging from 140M to 8B parameters. In a direct commitment to transparency, we release all models, data, and code. Extensive evaluation on 430 tasks demonstrates that our models set new records on 9 of 17 evaluated MTEB benchmarks, with particularly strong results in low-resource languages, providing a reproducible blueprint for building globally equitable and computationally efficient AI systems.
2605.15081.paper_summary_zh: 高品質文本嵌入的發展正日益朝向一個排他性的未來，這一未來由三個關鍵障礙所定義：高昂的計算成本、狹窄的語言焦點忽略了世界上大多數語言，以及來自封閉源或開放權重模型的缺乏透明度，這抑制了研究。為了拆除這些障礙，我們推出了ML-Embed，一套建立在新框架上的包容性和高效能模型：三維馬特里奧什卡學習（3D-ML）。我們的框架通過在整個模型生命周期中提供全面的效率來解決計算挑戰。除了馬特里奧什卡表示學習（MRL）的儲存優勢和馬特里奧什卡層學習（MLL）提供的靈活推理時間深度外，我們還引入了馬特里奧什卡嵌入學習（MEL）以提高參數效率。為了解決語言挑戰，我們策劃了一個大規模多語言數據集，並訓練了一套模型，參數範圍從1.4億到80億。在對透明度的直接承諾下，我們釋放了所有模型、數據和代碼。在430個任務上的廣泛評估顯示，我們的模型在17個評估的MTEB基準中創造了9個新紀錄，特別是在低資源語言中表現強勁，提供了一個可重複的藍圖，用於構建全球公平和計算高效的AI系統。
2605.15081.author: Ziyin Zhang et.al.
2605.15081.authors: Ziyin Zhang, Zihan Liao, Hang Yu, Peng Di, Rui Wang
